title: goal_spaces schema missing 7 columns from spec § 3.1
description: Spec § 3.1 mandates name, progress, constraints, acceptance_criteria, started_at, cancelled_at, deleted_at. Schema only models id, initiatorId, title, description, status, templateId, tags, createdAt, updatedAt, completedAt, cancelReason.
note_after_verify: Verified — direct diff against spec § 3.1 table.
recommendation: Rename 'title' to 'name' and add progress REAL NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, constraints TEXT DEFAULT '[]' json, acceptance_criteria TEXT DEFAULT '[]' json, started_at TEXT, cancelled_at TEXT, deleted_at TEXT. Migration 0003.

title: goal_spaces.status spec default mismatch — SELF-DOWNGRADED by agent (not a finding)
description: Downgraded: schema and trigger correctly enforce the 4-value enum from spec § 3.1. No action needed.
recommendation: No action.

title: node_boards schema has 'name' column missing — uses 'title' instead of spec 'name'
description: Spec § 3.2 lists 'name' VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL. Schema implements 'title' instead.
recommendation: Rename node_boards.title to name in schema.ts (column 'name').

title: node_boards.status enum values diverge from spec § 3.2
description: Spec § 3.2: active/completed/archived. Schema uses ['active', 'paused', 'archived'].
recommendation: Replace with ['active', 'completed', 'archived'] and update the 0001 trigger in a new migration.

title: node_board_members.role default 'editor' vs spec 'member'
description: Spec § 3.3: owner/member/viewer default 'member'. Schema: editor/viewer/observer default 'editor'.
recommendation: Change to ['owner', 'member', 'viewer'] and default to 'member'. Add CHECK trigger in new migration.

title: sessions.status enum values diverge from spec § 3.4
description: Spec § 3.4: queued/running/completed/failed/cancelled. Schema: active/paused/expired/closed/crashed.
recommendation: Replace with spec values and update 0001 trigger.

title: sessions schema missing trigger/actor/actor_name and uses 'role' instead; missing indexes
description: Spec § 3.4 sessions: status, trigger, actor, actor_name, started_at, completed_at, context, created_at, updated_at. Schema has role, lastActiveAt, expiresAt, closedAt, closeReason — re-modeled as user-sessions.
recommendation: Re-model sessions per spec. Move auth-style fields (role/expiresAt/closedAt) to a separate user_sessions table if needed.

title: agent_executions.output column spec divergence (spec calls it 'result' not 'output')
description: Spec § 3.5 column is 'result' (JSONB). Schema uses 'output'. Also input vs spec 'input_context'.
recommendation: Rename input->input_context and output->result in schema.ts; new migration 0003 to ALTER TABLE RENAME COLUMN.

title: state_transitions schema is entity-polymorphic, not card-scoped per spec § 3.7
description: Spec § 3.7 requires card_id FK NOT NULL, session_id FK (nullable), from_state, to_state, trigger, actor, actor_name, reason, evidence, timestamp. Schema implements entity-polymorphic version.
recommendation: Re-model state_transitions with cardId (NOT NULL FK), sessionId (FK), fromState, toState, trigger, actor, actorName, reason, evidence, timestamp. New migration 0003 with table rebuild.

title: state_transitions createdAt column name mismatches spec 'timestamp'
description: Spec § 3.7 column 'timestamp'. Schema uses 'createdAt' and index 'idx_state_transitions_created_at'.
recommendation: Rename state_transitions.createdAt -> timestamp (column 'timestamp') and rename the index.

title: human_confirmations schema is missing 13 spec § 3.8 columns
description: Spec § 3.8 lists many columns: target_state, trigger_reason, triggered_by, triggered_at, ai_summary, risk_factors, recommendations, ai_confidence, decision_outcome, decision_comment, resolved_at. Schema only has 11 columns.
note_after_verify: Verified — direct spec § 3.8 ↔ schema diff; 13 columns missing.
recommendation: Add the 10+ missing columns. Add CHECK trigger for trigger_type values matching spec and for decision_outcome.

title: human_confirmations.trigger_type enum values diverge from spec § 3.8
description: Spec § 3.8: high_risk/low_confidence/external_write/deployment/irreversible. Schema: high_risk_action/confirmation_timeout/external_input/external_result/system_override.
recommendation: Align to spec values; add CHECK trigger in new migration.

title: human_confirmations.status enum drift: schema has 'timed_out' but spec uses 'cancelled'
description: Spec § 3.8: pending/approved/rejected/cancelled. Schema: pending/approved/rejected/timed_out.
recommendation: Replace 'timed_out' with 'cancelled' in CONFIRMATION_STATUS_VALUES and update 0001 trigger.

title: cards schema is missing evidence, confidence, dependencies, risk_level
description: Spec § 3.6 cards requires risk_level, evidence, confidence, dependencies, priority (INTEGER), display_id VARCHAR(50). Schema: risk_level absent, evidence absent, confidence absent, dependencies absent, priority is text default 'medium' (spec integer), display_id is integer (spec VARCHAR).
recommendation: Change priority to integer default 0. Add riskLevel, evidence (json), confidence (real), dependencies (json). Change displayId to text VARCHAR(50).

title: cards.priority default 'medium' conflicts with spec § 3.6 default 0
description: Spec § 3.6 priority INTEGER DEFAULT 0. Schema: text default 'medium'.
recommendation: Use integer('priority').notNull().default(0). Update all DTOs.

title: realtime_events actor columns missing
description: Spec § 3.10 requires actor_type NOT NULL and actor_id (nullable). Schema is missing both.
recommendation: Add actorType (text NOT NULL enum) and actorId (text nullable).

title: realtime_events column names diverge from spec § 3.10
description: Spec: type, resource_type, resource_id, data, occurred_at, goal_space_id, sequence. Schema: eventType, resourceType, resourceId, payload, publishedAt.
recommendation: Rename eventType -> type, payload -> data, publishedAt -> occurredAt.

title: realtime_events resource_type CHECK trigger absent
description: Spec § 3.10 resource_type values are constrained. Schema intentionally does not constrain; no CHECK trigger in 0001 either. Also 'confirm' vs 'confirmation' vocabulary drift.
recommendation: Add CHECK trigger for resource_type in new migration. Unify 'confirm'/'confirmation' vocabulary.

title: audit_entries timestamp column name drift ('occurred_at' vs spec 'timestamp')
description: Spec § 3.9 column 'timestamp'. Schema uses 'occurredAt'/'occurred_at'.
recommendation: Rename occurred_at -> timestamp in schema.ts.

title: audit_entries.actor column drift: schema has actor_type but spec calls it 'actor'
description: Spec § 3.9 column 'actor' (3-value enum). Schema uses 'actorType' and adds 'actorId'. Same for state_transitions.
recommendation: Rename auditEntries.actorType -> actor, add actorName. Rename stateTransitions.actorType -> actor, add actorName.

title: Missing indexes called out in spec § 3
description: Spec indexes missing: idx_goal_spaces_created, idx_sessions_created, idx_cards_priority, idx_cards_risk_level, idx_cards_created, idx_agent_executions_role, idx_agent_executions_created, idx_transitions_card, idx_transitions_session, idx_transitions_timestamp, idx_transitions_actor, idx_confirm_decided_by, idx_audit_actor, idx_realtime_events_goal_space, idx_realtime_events_resource, idx_users_role.
recommendation: Add the missing indexes in new migration 0003.

title: Missing FK from state_transitions.card_id (card FK required by spec § 3.7 and ER)
description: Spec § 3.7 requires state_transitions.card_id FK -> cards.id (NOT NULL) and session_id FK -> sessions.id (nullable). Current schema has neither FK — entity-polymorphic via (entity_type, entity_id).
recommendation: Add cardId (NOT NULL FK -> cards.id) and sessionId (FK -> sessions.id). Build table in new migration (table rebuild like 0002).

title: cards missing FK on risk_level to a lookup or CHECK constraint; column itself missing
description: Spec § 3.6 cards.risk_level NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium'. Schema has no risk_level column at all.
recommendation: Add riskLevel text NOT NULL DEFAULT 'medium' with enum constraint. Add CHECK trigger in new migration.

title: goal_spaces.initiator_id has no ON DELETE rule
description: No explicit onDelete. SQLite default is 'no action', acceptable for append-only semantics but not documented.
recommendation: Document the ON DELETE NO ACTION default in the schema comment block.

title: Missing Drizzle relations() definitions for FKs
description: Defines column-level .references() but no Drizzle `relations()`. Breaks typed relational query API.
recommendation: Add a `relations` object exporting relations for all 11 tables.

title: Migration 0001 ADD COLUMN goal_space_id NOT NULL without default fails on populated DBs
description: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN with NOT NULL and no DEFAULT requires the table to be empty. Backfill is 'intentionally omitted' per comment.
recommendation: Two-step: (a) add column nullable, (b) backfill, (c) enforce NOT NULL via table rebuild or CHECK trigger.

title: Migration 0001 DROP COLUMN 'error' is irreversible and not gated by data verification
description: Drops 'error' column irreversibly without first backfilling error_code/error_message from the existing 'error' column.
recommendation: Add columns error_code, error_message first, backfill, then DROP.

title: Root drizzle.config.ts / drizzle-sqlite.config.ts reference non-existent schema path
description: Reference './src/core/**/*.schema.ts' but src/core/ is empty. Active schema lives at apps/web/db/schema.ts.
recommendation: Delete root configs or point to apps/web/db/schema.ts.

title: CHECK trigger for node_board_members.role is not installed in 0001 or 0002
description: Migration 0001 adds CHECK triggers for many enum columns but NOT for node_board_members.role. Without a CHECK trigger, DB accepts any text.
recommendation: After fixing DB-005, add CHECK trigger for node_board_members.role in new migration.

title: Indexes desc-direction dropped from schema indexes (intentional per F-001, but spec has DESC)
description: schema.ts declares '索引顺序: (col_a, col_b) — SQLite B-tree 双向扫描'. Drizzle indexes don't include .desc() even though spec indexes use DESC.
recommendation: Document that spec DESC indexes are equivalent to ASC Drizzle indexes in SQLite; add ORDER BY DESC at query sites.

title: realtimeEvents.publishedAt column drift vs spec occurred_at
description: Spec § 3.10 column is 'occurred_at'. Schema uses 'publishedAt'/'published_at'.
recommendation: Rename published_at -> occurred_at.

title: Migration 0001 ALTER TABLE with FK to goal_spaces in PRAGMA foreign_keys=OFF window
description: PRAGMA foreign_keys=OFF during ALTER TABLE; FK clause stored but not validated against existing rows.
recommendation: Add a sanity check after PRAGMA foreign_keys=ON: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent_executions ae WHERE NOT EXISTS (...).

title: Migration 0002 backfill uses deterministic synthetic id, partial unique index may collide on rerun
description: INSERT OR IGNORE INTO node_boards ... '_synthetic_' || goal_space_id. Predictable id format may collide if a real board later uses the same id.
recommendation: Use UUID v4 for synthetic ids. Add final verification: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cards c WHERE NOT EXISTS (...).

title: Migration 0002 does not drop the supporting UNIQUE INDEX idx_node_boards_id_goal_space_unique
description: Creates a UNIQUE INDEX (id, goal_space_id) for the composite FK. The index is a new persistent storage cost; essentially redundant with the PK (id alone is unique).
recommendation: Document long-term cost. Consider denormalizing goal_space_id in cards with CHECK trigger instead.

title: cards.display_id stored as integer but spec § 3.6 says VARCHAR(50) 'CARD-001' format
description: Spec § 3.6 cards.display_id VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL with example 'CARD-001'. Schema stores as integer.
recommendation: Change displayId to text('display_id', { length: 50 }).notNull().

title: users.role default 'initiator' in schema vs spec default 'chain_user'
description: Spec § 3.11 users.role DEFAULT 'chain_user'. Schema uses DEFAULT 'initiator'. SECURITY IMPACT: every new user is the highest-privilege role.
recommendation: Change default to 'chain_user' in schema.ts and migration 0000/0001. Document the elevation path in the auth handler.

title: users missing role index from spec § 3.11
description: Spec § 3.11 CREATE INDEX idx_users_role ON users(role). Schema has no role index.
recommendation: Add index('idx_users_role').on(t.role).

title: cards missing priority, risk_level, created_at, tags GIN-equivalent indexes from spec § 3.6
description: Spec § 3.6 indexes: idx_cards_priority, idx_cards_risk_level, idx_cards_created, idx_cards_tags USING GIN. Schema only has goal_space, node_board, state, assigned_to, and the partial unique.
recommendation: Add indexes for priority, risk_level, created_at. For tags, since SQLite has no GIN, document the chosen strategy.

title: agent_executions missing role/created_at indexes from spec § 3.5
description: Spec § 3.5: idx_agent_executions_role, idx_agent_executions_created. Schema only has goal_space, card, session, status.
recommendation: Add role and created_at indexes in schema.ts.

title: state_transitions missing card_id/session_id/timestamp/actor indexes from spec § 3.7
description: Spec § 3.7 indexes: idx_transitions_card, idx_transitions_session, idx_transitions_timestamp (DESC), idx_transitions_actor. Schema has only entity(entityType,entityId) and createdAt.
recommendation: After fixing DB-022, add the 4 spec indexes.

title: human_confirmations missing decided_by index from spec § 3.8
description: Spec § 3.8: idx_confirm_decided_by ON human_confirmations(decided_by). Schema has status, expires_at, partial unique only.
recommendation: Add index('idx_human_confirmations_decided_by').on(t.decisionBy).

title: audit_entries missing actor index from spec § 3.9
description: Spec § 3.9: idx_audit_actor ON audit_entries(actor). Schema has entity(entity_type,entity_id) and occurred_at only.
recommendation: Add index('idx_audit_entries_actor').on(t.actorType) after fixing DB-020.

title: realtime_events missing resource-type/id and goal_space_id+occurred_at indexes from spec § 3.10
description: Spec § 3.10: idx_realtime_events_goal_space, idx_realtime_events_resource. Schema has only unique (goal_space_id, sequence) and published_at index.
recommendation: Add the resource lookup index and (goal_space_id, occurredAt) composite index after fixing DB-017.

title: Soft-delete pattern: 'deleted_at' is missing on goal_spaces
description: Spec § 3.1 goal_spaces.deleted_at is required (soft-delete pattern). Schema has no deleted_at column on goal_spaces.
recommendation: Add deletedAt text('deleted_at') to goal_spaces. Mirror in new migration 0003.

title: node_boards.status trigger enforces 'paused'/'active'/'archived' (drift) — DB-004 root cause
description: Trigger trg_node_boards_status_check enforces ('active','paused','archived'). Spec § 3.2 requires 'active'/'completed'/'archived'.
recommendation: Re-define trigger to IN ('active','completed','archived') in new migration.
